parameters.query: SELECT CASE $1 WHEN 'projects' THEN (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (SELECT id, name, project_type, property_type, property_area_m2, location_city, current_phase, budget_target, status, started_at, completed_at, created_at FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC) t) WHEN 'invoices' THEN (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (SELECT id, project_id, supplier_name, invoice_date, total_amount, status, paid_at, created_at FROM invoices ORDER BY created_at DESC) t) WHEN 'tokens' THEN (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (SELECT id, project_id, client_id, purpose, expires_at, last_used_at, revoked_at, created_at FROM client_access_tokens ORDER BY created_at DESC) t) WHEN 'aftercare' THEN (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (SELECT id, project_id, severity, status, category, reported_at, resolved_at, assigned_to FROM aftercare_incidents ORDER BY reported_at DESC) t) WHEN 'contracts' THEN (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (SELECT id, project_id, contract_type, status, signed_at, expires_at, created_at FROM contracts ORDER BY created_at DESC) t) WHEN 'llm_calls' THEN (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (SELECT occurred_at, agent_name, project_id, model, tokens_in, tokens_out, cost_usd, latency_ms, status FROM llm_calls WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY occurred_at DESC) t) END AS rows;
